expected_behaviors: Introduces the session and sets expectations
Guides through discovery sections: Team & Context, Goals, Working Preferences, Expectations
Captures team structure: 6-person data engineering team
Notes top 3 priorities: 99.9% SLA, Dagster migration, data catalog
Records working preferences: Slack-first, async, remote, no ad-hoc calls
Identifies non-negotiables: CI/CD pipeline, on-call rotation
Posts comprehensive discovery report at end
Uses kutana_raise_hand to ask discovery questions
anti_patterns: Makes promises on behalf of the organization
Infers or assumes information instead of asking
Skips sections of the discovery flow
Does not validate and summarize what was heard
